_meta.name: US state medical board cross-reference seed
_meta.purpose: Input for the AlignMD license-status agent (T5). For each parsed credential, the license-status agent reads the issuing_state, looks up the matching board entry here, and stages a verification payload (lookup URL + query method). NO live scraping happens against these boards from the agent — most boards block bots and the sandbox has no board network access. The agent stages the payload and flags stale checks for human verification.
_meta.source: seed knowledge as of 2026-06; board NAMES are stable and high-confidence, but lookup_url and latency fields are SCAFFOLD VALUES that T5/a human must verify before any production lookup. Treat lookup_verified:false entries as needing confirmation.

schema.name: Official allopathic (MD) licensing board name. notes field flags states with a separate osteopathic (DO) board.
schema.lookup_url: Public license-verification entry point (search page or profile URL). Form-based searches are flagged in query_method.
schema.lookup_url_pattern: URL template with {license_number} / {last_name} / {first_name} placeholders where the board supports a direct-link lookup; null when the board only exposes a POST search form.
schema.query_method: GET_DIRECT (license substitutes into the URL) | POST_FORM (must submit a search form) | aggregator (use national_aggregator fallback)
schema.latency_estimate: Rough expected turnaround for getting a verification result. real-time = online portal returns immediately; the slower buckets describe boards whose authoritative primary-source verification is email/mail/fee-gated. confidence is low — verify in T5.
schema.lookup_verified: false until a human or T5 confirms the URL/pattern resolves

national_aggregator.name: FSMB DocInfo (Federation of State Medical Boards Physician Data Center)
national_aggregator.note: National fallback that aggregates board-action and licensure data across member boards. Use when a state's own lookup is form-only or unverified. Some detail is fee-gated.
